Military


Ukraine Conflict News





13 June 2025 Military News

Operations
Defense Policy / Programs
Defense Industry
Other Conflicts
News Reports

Current Operations

  • Update: Appeals court temporarily blocks judge's order to return control of California National Guard to governor: media Global Times 13 Jun 2025 -- A federal appeals court late Thursday blocked a lower court judge's order instructing US President Donald Trump to return control of 4,000 California National Guard troops that he had federalized to Gov. Gavin Newsom, CNBC reported.
  • U.S. judge orders Trump to return control of National Guard to California People's Daily 13 Jun 2025 -- A federal judge issued a temporary restraining order late Thursday, directing U.S. President Donald Trump to return control of the National Guard to California.
  • Marines to Guard Federal Property, Personnel in L.A. as Guard Troops Transition to Protecting Law Enforcement DoD News 13 Jun 2025 -- Roughly 200 Marines will begin protecting federal property and personnel in Los Angeles today after relieving the California National Guard, which was mobilized amidst a breakout of civil unrest in the city, June 7, 2025, a senior military official said today.

  • US reinforces military presence in Syria despite 'withdrawal' claims Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- The Pentagon has been quietly increasing the US military presence in Syria despite repeated announcements about plans for "troop withdrawals."

  • USS Cole Assists Royal Canadian Navy, U.S. Coast Guard, Conduct At-Sea Transfer of Intercepted Contraband US Navy 13 Jun 2025 -- The Arleigh Burke-class guided missile destroyer USS Cole (DDG 67), supporting maritime southern border operations, conducted a hold-and-transfer of 245 kilograms of contraband recovered by the Royal Canadian Navy Harry DeWolf-class offshore patrol vessel HMCS William Hall (AOPV 433) in the Caribbean Sea June 9.

Defense Policy / Programs

  • Army Launches Detachment 201: Executive Innovation Corps to Drive Tech Transformation US Army 13 Jun 2025 -- The U.S. Army is establishing Detachment 201: The Army's Executive Innovation Corps, a new initiative designed to fuse cutting-edge tech expertise with military innovation. On June 13, 2025, the Army will officially swear in four tech leaders.
  • Maryland Guard, Croatia Support Immediate Response 25 Army News 13 Jun 2025 -- More than 100 Maryland Army National Guard Soldiers trained with the Armed Forces of Bosnia and Herzegovina (AFBiH) to support NATO's large-scale exercise Immediate Response 25 at the Red Land Training Area in Croatia, May 27-June 10.
  • Maine National Guard Soldiers Train in Real-World Scenarios Thanks to First Army Army News 13 Jun 2025 -- Soldiers of the 120th Regional Support Group to the Maine Army National Guard had the opportunity to support the Army's Mobilization Support Force concept while conducting a staff exercise training event during annual training June 1-5.
  • Modern Trenches, Modern Threats: Combat Engineering in the Drone Age US Navy 13 Jun 2025 -- As part of exercise Baltic Operations (BALTOPS) 2025, U.S. Navy Seabees, U.S. Marines from 8th Engineer Support Battalion (ESB), and Latvian Army engineers are constructing a fortified trench network designed for survivability in a drone-contested battlespace. The project serves both as a realistic rehearsal and a proof of concept for how modern combat engineers support maneuverability, concealment, and endurance in multi-domain operations.
  • Texas, Nebraska Guard Train With Czechia Against Cyber Threats Army News 13 Jun 2025 -- Hidden within a discreet concrete building, teams from various states and countries collaborate across screens and keyboards for Cyber Shield 2025.
  • Beyond the Horizon: JUMP 20 Extends the 22nd MEU's Maritime Dominance USMC News 13 Jun 2025 -- The 22nd MEU's rigorous pre-deployment training cultivates a culture of relentless innovation, ensuring it remains at the forefront of distributed maritime operations (DMO). This commitment to adaptation is exemplified by the integration of the JUMP 20 UAS, whose advanced multi-sensor ISR capabilities significantly expand the MEU's targeting effectiveness in complex littoral environments, demonstrated by its first-ever flight aboard an amphibious warship.

  • NATO Secretary General in Stockholm, highlights Sweden's defence industry leadership and support to Ukraine NATO 13 Jun 2025 -- NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte met Prime Minister of Sweden Ulf Kristersson in Stockholm on Friday (13 June 2025) to discuss preparations for the NATO Summit in The Hague.
  • NATO's Standing Naval Forces Join Exercise Polaris to boost maritime power and unity NATO Allied Maritime Command 13 Jun 2025 -- NATO ships from Standing NATO Maritime Group One (SNMG1) took part in Exercise Polaris 25 in the Northern Atlantic Ocean and English Channel. Led by France, this ten-day operational readiness exercise prepared naval forces for high-intensity combat, as they tackled multiple threats in a contested, complex environment - combining land, sea, air, cyber, seabed, cyberspace, space, electronic warfare and the information field.

  • Ammunition Supply under the "Ammunition Initiative": Meeting between the Ministries of Defence of Ukraine and the Czech Republic Ukraine MOD 13 Jun 2025

  • Regular Press Briefing of the Ministry of National Defense on June 13, 2025 PRC MND 13 Jun 2025
  • China has clearly stated solemn position on Japanese jet's intrusion into Chinese fleet's training zone: FM Global Times 13 Jun 2025 -- At a press briefing of the Chinese Foreign Ministry (FM) on Friday, a reporter noted that the Chinese side said on Thursday that last week, a Japan Air Self-Defense Force jet intruded into the Chinese fleet's training zone, seriously disrupting normal training activities, and Japan's close-in reconnaissance on China's routine military operations constitutes the root cause of maritime and aerial security risks. The reporter said that Japan's Ministry of Defense on Friday called this "unacceptable," and asked China's comments.
  • Japan urged to stop dangerous provocations: China's National Defense Ministry responds to 'aircraft carriers' unusual close operation' Global Times 13 Jun 2025 -- In response to a media inquiry on Japanese Ministry of Defense's claim that two Chinese aircraft carriers were operating simultaneously in the Pacific for the first time, and that Chinese carrier-based aircraft came "unusually close" to a Japanese military patrol plane, Jiang Bin, spokesperson for China's Ministry of National Defense said on Friday that recently, the Chinese Navy's Liaoning and Shandong aircraft carrier groups conducted routine training in the Western Pacific.

  • Exclusive: China can build a lot of J-35 fighters, top designer tells GT Global Times 13 Jun 2025 -- China's second type of fifth-generation fighter jet, the J-35A, has been a global focal point since its debut at the 2024 Airshow China. The J-35A is scheduled to make an international appearance in model form at the upcoming 55th Paris Air Show, which is expected to once again stir up a wave of excitement around Chinese warplanes, the Global Times learned.
  • China stays committed to promoting a steady, sound and sustainable China-US mil-to-mil ties: Defense Spokesperson PRC MND 13 Jun 2025 -- "We hope the US side will stop playing up the alleged 'China threat', respect China's core interests," said Senior Colonel Jiang Bin, spokesperson for China's Ministry of National Defense, at a press briefing on Friday.

  • The Ministry of National Defense released a press statement in response to the legislator's proposed amendment to have ''prohibited and restricted waters announced by the Ocean Affairs Council." ROC MND 13 Jun 2025
  • U.S. Navy holds war games to deter Chinese invasion of Taiwan: Official CNA 13 Jun 2025 -- The U.S. Navy regularly conducts global war games to develop deterrence strategies against a potential Chinese invasion of Taiwan, aiming to make the island "a very difficult target to take," said Acting Chief of Naval Operations James Kilby.

  • Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Makes Speech at Ceremony of Launching Destroyer of Navy of Korean People's Army KCNA 13 Jun 2025 -- The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un made a speech at a ceremony of launching a destroyer of the Navy of the Korean People's Army on June 12.
  • North Korea relaunches 'restored' warship with fanfare, 3 weeks after failure Radio Free Asia 14 Jun 2025 -- A North Korean warship damaged during its launch three weeks ago has been formally relaunched at a grand ceremony with leader Kim Jong Un, state media showed Friday, but analysts say the 5,000-ton destroyer may not yet be fully operational.
  • Revolution in Warship-building Industry in New Era and Vigorous Advance and Development in Modernization of Naval Forces Ceremony of Launching Destroyer of KPA Navy Takes Place with Splendor KCNA 13 Jun 2025 -- The firm faith and steadfast revolutionary will of the Workers' Party of Korea to firmly defend the long-term development of the prosperity and flourish of our great state with its strong, matchless and absolute strength are ushering in a shining heyday of the naval forces of the DPRK along with the steady birth of the powerful Juche-based military hardware.

  • Australia's naval nuclear propulsion: AUKUS update to IAEA Board of Governors, June 2025 UK FCDO 13 Jun 2025 -- Update by Australia, the UK and the USA (AUKUS) to the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) Board of Governors on Australia's naval nuclear propulsion programme
  • Nuclear safeguards and the NPT: AUKUS Side Event, May 2025 UK FCDO 13 Jun 2025 -- Australian statement as delivered by Vanessa Wood, Ambassador for Arms Control and Counter-Proliferation

  • His Majesty's Canadian Ship Frédérick Rolette Commissioned into Service Canada 13 Jun 2025 -- Today, the Royal Canadian Navy (RCN) welcomed His Majesty's Canadian Ship (HMCS) Frédérick Rolette into naval service with a commissioning ceremony.

  • DEFENCE SECRETARY ATTENDS CLOSING CEREMONY OF INDIA-MONGOLIA JOINT MILITARY EXERCISE NOMADIC ELEPHANT India PIB 13 Jun 2025 -- The 17th edition of the India-Mongolia Joint Military Exercise NOMADIC ELEPHANT concluded today at Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia

  • Successful trial paves the way for improved reconnaissance on Army operations UK MOD 13 Jun 2025 -- Recent trial saw a single operator controlling three uncrewed vehicles, which detected and classified threats.

  • President and Ministerial Committee on Foreign and Security Policy discuss support for Ukraine, Finland's preparations for the NATO Summit, and the current situation in Israel and Palestine Finnish Government 13 Jun 2025 -- In their meeting on Friday 13 June, the President of the Republic and the Ministerial Committee on Foreign and Security Policy discussed the current state of the Ukraine peace negotiations, proposals to achieve peace and bring an end to Russia's unlawful war of aggression, and support for Ukraine.

  • National Coordinators advance work on Icebreaker Collaboration Effort Finnish Government 13 Jun 2025 -- Representatives from Canada, Finland and the United States met to discuss the next steps in the ICE Pact collaboration to build Arctic and polar icebreakers.

  • Security Made in Poland: Government Boosts National Defense Industry Poland - Chancellery of the Prime Minister 13 Jun 2025 -- Poland is investing in its security. Mesko, the country's leading ammunition producer, now manufactures 1 million rounds of small-caliber ammunition per day-five times more than before.

  • Iceland and France strengthen bilateral defence cooperation Government of Iceland 13 Jun 2025 -- The Icelandic and French authorities have agreed to further strengthen their bilateral defence cooperation. A Letter of Intent to this effect was signed at the Ministry for Foreign Affairs of Iceland earlier this week.

  • RNZAF building up for major combat exercise in Australia New Zealand Defence Force 13 Jun 2025 -- In the build-up to the high-tempo international warfighting Exercise Talisman Sabre in Australia next month the Royal New Zealand Air Force's (RNZAF) NH90 helicopters and crews have been working on live-firing and formation flight skills.

  • Army Aviation Regiment conducts air patrol over PH Sea Philippine News Agency 13 Jun 2025 -- The Philippine Army (PA) said Friday its Army Aviation Regiment conducted a maritime air patrol (MARPAT) over the Philippine Sea on June 11 as part of its maritime domain mission.

Other Conflicts


    Ukraine Conflict News

  • 13 June 2025 - Daily Press Briefing by the Office of the Spokesperson for the Secretary-General United Nations 13 Jun 2025

    • Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots

  • Humanitarians must be able to deliver aid in Gaza, UN agencies insist UN News 13 Jun 2025 -- UN agencies on Friday continue to stress they must be allowed to deliver aid in the Gaza Strip as famine looms and a telecommunications blackout threatens lifesaving operations.
  • Food insecurity in Lebanon returns to near pre-conflict levels - but gains remain fragile, new report shows WFP 13 Jun 2025 -- Under the patronage and in the presence of Lebanese Minister of Agriculture Dr. Nizar Hani, and with the participation of WFP Representative and Country Director in Lebanon Mr. Matthew Hollingworth, Acting FAO Representative in Lebanon Ms. Veronica Quattrola and a number of experts and officials from the Ministry of Agriculture, the Lebanon: Integrated Food Security Phase Classification report for the period of April to October 2025 was launched at the Ministry's headquarters in Beirut.
  • UN Warns of Internet Blackout in Gaza Strip Paralyzing Aid Operations Sputnik 13 Jun 2025 -- A complete collapse of internet and data services across the Gaza Strip has paralyzed deliveries of humanitarian aid to the Palestinian enclave, UN deputy spokesman Farhan Haq said on Thursday.
  • UN General Assembly adopts resolution demanding immediate Gaza ceasefire People's Daily 13 Jun 2025 -- The General Assembly, at an Emergency Special Session, adopted a resolution on Thursday that demands an immediate ceasefire in Gaza and immediate access to humanitarian assistance at scale.

  • Gaza: Secretary General Alain Berset calls for an immediate ceasefire, full and unhindered access for humanitarian assistance, and the urgent resumption of a credible political process Council of Europe 13 Jun 2025 -- The latest attacks by Israel on Iran, which threaten the stability of the entire region, must not make us lose sight of the fact that the humanitarian situation in Gaza has reached an intolerable level of severity.

  • Fresh Yemeni strike triggers sirens in Israeli-occupied territories Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Israeli media have reported that warning sirens were heard in Al-Quds and its southern regions amid the launch of a missile from Yemen towards the occupied territories.

    • Operation Rising Lion / Operation True Promise III

  • Prime Minister's Office Announcement Israel - Prime Minister 13 Jun 2025
  • PM Netanyahu addresses the Iranian people Israel - Prime Minister 13 Jun 2025-- "To the proud people of Iran, We are in the midst of one of the greatest military operations in history, Operation Rising Lion."
  • Israel's operation in Iran - statement by President Herzog Israel MFA 13 Jun 2025 -- "Israel has the inherent right and the solemn duty to defend itself—and will always do so with determination and clarity. We sincerely hope that this will change the trajectory of our region towards a more peaceful and prosperous future."
  • FM Sa'ar speaks with French Minister for Europe and Foreign Affairs Jean-Noël Barrot Israel MFA 13 Jun 2025
  • FM Sa'ar speaks with the foreign ministers of Germany and Italy Israel MFA 13 Jun 2025
  • The IDF has Launched a Preemptive Strike Against Iran's Nuclear Program Israel Defense Forces 13 Jun 2025
  • The announcement by the Commander of the Home Front Command, MG Rafi Milo Israel Defense Forces 13 Jun 2025
  • The announcement by the Chief of the General Staff, LTG Eyal Zamir Israel Defense Forces 13 Jun 2025
  • Head of the Intelligence Directorate, Major General Shlomi Binder, in the Israeli Air Force Underground Command Center Israel Defense Forces 13 Jun 2025
  • The IDF Continues Commander of the Israeli Air Force, Maj. Gen. Tomer Bar, From the IAF's Underground Operations Centerto Strike Targets in Iran Israel Defense Forces 13 Jun 2025
  • The Head of the Operations Directorate, MG Oded Basiuk, held a situational assessment today with the Commander of the Northern Corps Israel Defense Forces 13 Jun 2025
  • The Statement By the Chief of the General Staff, LTG Eyal Zamir Israel Defense Forces 13 Jun 2025
  • IDF reveals the Iranian plan to destroy Israel Israel Defense Forces 13 Jun 2025
  • Information on the Iranian Nuclear Project Israel Defense Forces 13 Jun 2025

  • The IDF Has Completed a Large-Scale Strike Against the Aerial Defense Array of the Iranian Regime in Western Iran Israel Defense Forces 13 Jun 2025
  • The IDF Struck Iran's Largest Uranium Enrichment Site in the Natanz Area Israel Defense Forces 13 Jun 2025
  • The IDF Eliminated the Commander of the Air Force of the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps Israel Defense Forces 13 Jun 2025
  • The IDF Completed a Series of Strikes Against the Iranian Regime's Surface-to-Surface Missile Array Israel Defense Forces 13 Jun 2025
  • The IDF Struck the Nuclear Site in the Isfahan Area Israel Defense Forces 13 Jun 2025

  • Press Briefing by IDF Spokesperson, BG Effie Defrin-June 13, 2025 Israel Defense Forces 13 Jun 2025

  • Iran destroys two Israeli F-35 fighter jets IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- The Air Defense Force of the Islamic Republic of Iran's Army successfully shot down and destroyed two Israeli F-35 fighter jets and a large number of their micro air vehicles.
  • Armed Forces start pounding Israel IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- Israel began feeling Iran's wrath on Friday evening as the Islamic Republic of Iran Armed Forces started a wave of strikes on Israel.
  • Pezeshkian vows Zionist regime's aggression will be met with appropriate response IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- President Masoud Pezeshkian in a phone conversation described the Israeli regime's strikes on Iran as a blatant violation of international law, emphasizing that this aggression will be met with an appropriate response.
  • In televised message to nation, Leader says life will turn bleak for Israel IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei says the Israeli regime will not be able to walk away from the Friday strikes on Iran unharmed.
  • I.R.G.C.'s new chief: Gates of hell will soon open to the Israeli regime IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- The new commander of the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (I.R.G.C.) says the force will soon unleash hell on the Israeli regime in response to unprovoked strikes on Iranian territory.
  • Foreign Minister Araqchi urges E.U. to condemn Israeli strikes as criminal act IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi has termed Israeli attacks on Iranian territory as flagrant violations of international law, noting that Iran expects the European Union to condemn the Israeli criminal strikes.
  • Araqchi: Israeli attacks are tantamount to declaration of war against Iran IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi in a letter to the United Nations has stressed that the international community must not allow the Israeli crimes to go unpunished, adding that the U.N. Security Council and the Secretary-General must condemn them immediately and unequivocally and take action.
  • U.S. is complicit in Israeli strikes on Iran: Leader's top aide IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- Ali Akbar Velayati, a senior advisor to the Leader of the Islamic Revolution on international affairs, has released a statement announcing that the United States is complicit in Israeli strikes.
  • I.R.G.C. says will respond to Israeli attacks at the proper time and place IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- The public relations office of the Islamic Revolution Guard Corps (I.R.G.C.) has announced that the Zionist regime of Israel and its regional and international supporters will undoubtedly receive a proportionate and decisive response at an appropriate time and place of its choosing.
  • President Pezeshkian: Iran will make Israel regret its folly IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- President Masoud Pezeshkian has condemned the Israeli attack on Iranian soil and killing many civilians, saying that Iran will not remain silent in the face of this crime and will make the enemy regret its foolish act.
  • Leader appoints new top military brass IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei has appointed new top military commanders.
  • Pezeshkian administration: Iran will write the ending to this story IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- The administration of Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian has released a statement, announcing that Iran will avenge the blood of every single individual killed in Israeli strikes on Friday.
  • Armed Forces: Iran's response will be crushing IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- The General Staff of the Islamic Republic Armed Forces says Iran's response to the Israeli regime's strikes on Iranian territory will be crushing.
  • Iran's supreme leader warn Israel of harsh punishment following Israeli airstrikes People's Daily 13 Jun 2025 -- Iran's Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei said on Friday that Israel will receive harsh punishment following Israeli airstrikes on Iranian targets earlier in the day.
  • New IRGC Head Promises to Open 'Gates of Hell' for Israel After Its Strikes on Iran Sputnik 13 Jun 2025 -- The new head of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC), General Mohammad Pakpour said on Friday that he promises to open the "gates of hell" for Israel after its attacks on Iran.
  • New wave of Iranian missile strikes rocks Zionist entity, causing chaos and casualties Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- In a fresh wave, a series of Iranian missile strikes have hit multiple locations across the occupied Palestinian territories, causing extensive damage and casualties, according to reports.
  • At least 150 Israeli targets hit during Op. True Promise III: Senior IRGC official Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- A senior Iranian military official says at least 150 targets were struck during the retaliatory operation against the Israeli regime, including several critically strategic military bases.
  • Iran calls on UN Security Council to hold Israeli regime accountable for its crimes Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Iran's Permanent Representative to the United Nations, Amir Saeed Iravani, addressed an emergency session of the UN Security Council on Saturday following the Israeli military aggression against the Islamic Republic.
  • IRGC says its missiles struck 'sources of Israeli aggression' in retaliatory operation Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- In its latest update, the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) provided further details on the Islamic Republic's retaliatory operation against the occupied Palestinian territories, launched in response to early Friday morning Israeli aggression.
  • 'Unprecedented destruction' in Tel Aviv following True Promise III: Israeli media Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Israeli media, citing regime officials, report "unprecedented destruction" in Tel Aviv following Iran's successful retaliatory military operation - True Promise III on Friday.
  • Iran becomes first country to shoot down fifth-gen F-35 fighter jets belonging to Israel Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Iran has earned the distinction of being the first country in the world to successfully shoot down fifth-generation fighter jets by targeting two stealth F-35 fighters belonging to the Zionist regime.
  • True Promise III: A barrage of Iranian missiles pounds occupied territories Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Iran has launched its retaliatory operation following a series of Israeli attacks by firing a barrage of missiles towards the occupied Palestinian territories, sending illegal settlers into shelters.
  • Leader: Iranian Armed Forces will render 'despicable' Israeli regime helpless Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei says the Iranian Armed Forces will act strongly and render the despicable Israeli regime helpless.
  • Iran summons Swiss envoy to protest Israel's savage attack, breach of sovereignty Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Iran's Foreign Ministry has summoned the caretaker of Switzerland's embassy in Tehran to protest the Israeli regime's military operation against the country.
  • In letter to UN, UNSC, Iran FM says Israel's attack 'declaration of war' Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says the Israeli regime's act of aggression against the country amounts to a "declaration of war".
  • The gates of hell will soon open upon Zionists, warns new IRGC chief Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- The new commander of Iran's Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has vowed that the Islamic Republic would exact painful revenge on the Israeli regime over the latter's deadly attacks against the country on Friday.
  • President Pezeshkian: Iran's 'powerful' response to make Israel regret Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian vows a "legitimate and powerful" response to the enemy that will make it regret its preposterous action.
  • Commander of IRGC's Aerospace Division martyred in Israeli attacks Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has announced the martyrdom of Brigadier General Amir-Ali Hajizadeh, the commander of the IRGC's Aerospace Division, in the Israeli aggression on Iran early Friday.
  • Iran FM vows support for Armed Forces in defense against Israel Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has condemned in strongest terms Israel's deadly act of aggression, vowing support for the Armed Forces in defense of the nation against the criminal regime.
  • Iran's Leader names successors to commanders assassinated by Israel Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei has appointed successors to the military commanders assassinated in Israel's terrorist strikes early Friday.
  • No accident at Fordow; superficial damage at Natanz during Israeli aggression: Nuclear agency Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Iran's nuclear agency says there "have been no accidents" at the Fordow uranium enrichment facility in the country's north, adding that the Islamic Republic's main enrichment site in the central city of Natanz has suffered only "superficial damage" as a result of the assault.
  • Iranian government: Aggression proved Israel 'inherently terrorist' Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- The Iranian government has condemned Israel's deadly act of aggression against the country, saying the crime proved that the regime is terrorist by nature.
  • Deputy chief: IRGC operating normally, mobilized for retaliation Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) Deputy Commander Brigadier General Ali Fadavi says the force is operating normally despite the assassination of its chief commander in an Israeli strike, stressing that all capacities have been utilized as part of preparations for a retaliatory measure against the occupying regime.
  • Iran's military commanders vow 'crushing' response to Israel Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Iran's Minister of Defense Aziz Nasirzadeh says Israel's "Zionist criminals should expect a crushing and regretful response" from the Iranian Armed Forces following the regime's assassination of military commanders, scientists and civilians.
  • Ayatollah Khamenei: Israel today sealed a bitter and painful destiny for itself IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei says the Israeli regime sealed a "bitter and painful" destiny for itself with overnight strikes on Iran.
  • Leader: Zionist regime has prepared 'bitter and painful fate' for itself with latest attack Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Following the Israeli attack on residential areas in some Iranian cities, including Tehran, the Leader of the Islamic Revolution, Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei, warned that the regime must now await a harsh punishment."
  • Armed Forces spokesperson: Israel will pay a heavy price IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- Brigadier General Abolfazl Shekarchi, spokesperson for the Armed Forces, has confirmed Israeli strikes on Iranian territory, including residential buildings, and says the Islamic Republic's response to the attacks will be heavy.
  • IRGC's Chief Commander Maj. Gen. Hossein Salami and others assassinated in Israeli strikes IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- Chief Commander of the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) Major General Hossein Salami and other military and civilian figures have been assassinated in Israeli strikes in Tehran.
  • Senior commanders, scientists, civilians martyred in Israeli aggression Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Chief of Staff of the Armed Forces Major General Mohammad Bagheri and commander of the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) Major General Hossein Salami have been martyred in an Israeli aggression.
  • Israel, with US help, targeted civilian areas in Iran; must await 'severe response': Military spox Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- The Israeli enemy has launched the strikes against Iran with the help of America and attacked civilian areas, a senior Iranian commander has said.
  • Iran: US responsible for consequences of 'Israel's adventurism' Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Iran's Foreign Ministry has held the United States responsible for the dangerous consequences of Israel's terrorist act of aggression that violated the country's territorial integrity and national sovereignty.
  • IRGC vows heavy retribution following Israeli attacks on Iranian soil Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has condemned in the strongest terms the assassination of its chief commander Major General Hossein Salami in an Israeli military strike against Tehran, emphasizing that the occupying regime will face severe consequences for its latest acts of aggression against Iran's territory.
  • Senior IRGC commanders, including General Salami, martyred in Israeli attack: Report Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Major General Hossein Salami, commander of the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC), has been reportedly martyred in the Israeli attack on Tehran early Friday morning.
  • Israel strikes Tehran and other cities IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- The Israeli regime has carried out strikes in and near the Iranian capital, Tehran, as well as other cities in Iran.

  • Israeli Strikes Hit Iranian Capital, IDF Says Attacked Nuclear & Military Officials Sputnik 13 Jun 2025 -- The Axios news portal reported Thursday citing sources that the Israeli Air Force had struck targets in Iran.
  • Israel Strikes 'Heart' Of Iran's Ballistic Missile And Nuclear Enrichment Programs In Widespread Attack RFE/RL 13 Jun 2025 -- Israel conducted what it called "preemptive" strikes on Iranian nuclear facilities and military sites across the country on June 13, warning that the attacks will continue as it pursues its goal of preventing Tehran from building a nuclear weapon.
  • Israel announces 'preemptive strike' against Iran, explosions heard in Teheran: reports Global Times 13 Jun 2025 -- Israel has launched what it is calling a "preemptive strike" against Iran and declared a state of emergency. Explosions rang out across Iran's capital, according to media reports on Friday.
  • Israel conducts preemptive strike on Iran, major explosion heard in Tehran People's Daily 13 Jun 2025 -- Israeli Defense Minister Israel Katz said on Friday that Israel has conducted a "preemptive strike" on Iran, declaring a special state of emergency across the country.
  • An Encounter With An Iranian Nuclear Scientist Killed In The Israeli Air Strikes RFE/RL 13 Jun 2025 -- A familiar name surfaced on June 13 in news reports following Israeli strikes on Iran: Fereydoun Abbasi, the former head of Iran's Atomic Energy Organization.
  • Israel's Attack On Iran Stuns Military But Could Empower Tehran's Nuclear Drive RFE/RL 13 Jun 2025 -- Israel's large-scale assault on Iran appears to have stunned the country's military leadership and may have delayed an immediate retaliatory strike.
  • Who Were The 8 Iranian Generals Killed In The Israeli Attack? RFE/RL 13 Jun 2025 -- Israel's military claimed its air strikes killed another two Iranian generals, bringing the number of senior military commanders killed over two days of attacks to eight.
  • Iran-Israel tensions escalate after Israel hits nuclear sites, military leadership Global Times 13 Jun 2025 -- The Middle East has once again become the focus of global attention, after Israel launched unprecedented strikes on Iran, and Tehran vowed to retaliate. In the face of the danger of escalating tensions, various parties, including Egypt, the United Arab Emirates (UAE) and Qatar on Friday strongly condemned Israeli airstrikes on Iranian targets earlier in the day, while world leaders urged restraint in Iran-Israel escalation.
  • More explosions are heard in Iran IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- More explosions were heard in and near the capital, Tehran, late on Friday afternoon.
  • Top Iranian military commanders and civilian figures are assassinated in Israeli strikes IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- Chairman of the Chiefs of Staff of Iran's Armed Forces Major General Mohammad Baqeri, Chief Commander of the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (I.R.G.C.) Major General Hossein Salami, and other military and civilian figures have been assassinated in Israeli strikes in Tehran.
  • Israeli Strikes Hit Iranian Capital, IDF Says Attacked Nuclear & Military Officials Sputnik 13 Jun 2025 -- The Axios news portal reported Thursday citing sources that the Israeli Air Force had struck targets in Iran.

  • Trump Calls On Tehran To Negotiate 'Before It's Too Late' As Israeli Strikes Intensify RFE/RL 13 Jun 2025 -- US President Donald Trump warned Iran to make a nuclear deal "before it is too late" as Israel continued to conduct air strikes on Iranian nuclear facilities and other sites across Iran that have already killed a top general and two other military officials.

  • Security Council meets in emergency session over Iran-Israel conflict, amid strikes and counterstrikes UN News 13 Jun 2025 -- Israel's strikes on Iranian nuclear and military facilities mark a dangerous new escalation in the Middle East, a top UN official told the Security Council during an emergency session convened on Friday.
  • Israel-Iran crisis: UN chief urges calm after overnight strikes UN News 13 Jun 2025 -- Secretary-General António Guterres condemned Israeli strikes in Iran late Thursday evening, urging 'maximum restraint' from Member States. The head of the UN-backed atomic watchdog also highlighted the risk of a wider conflict.
  • Meeting in Wake of Israeli Air Strikes on Iran, Delegates in Security Council Urge De-escalation, Diplomacy to Prevent Further Strain in Conflict-Ridden Region UN Security Council 13 Jun 2025 -- Meeting in the hours following Israel's air strikes against targets in Iran, the Security Council today heard — and its members largely agreed — that de-escalation and diplomacy are imperative to avoid further strain in a region already groaning under the weight of compounding conflict.
  • Director General Grossi's Statement to UNSC on Situation in Iran IAEA 13 Jun 2025 -- Early this morning, the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) was informed of the military operation launched by Israel which includes attacks on nuclear facilities in the Islamic Republic of Iran.
  • Statement on the Situation in Iran IAEA 13 Jun 2025 -- Early this morning, the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) was informed of the military operation launched by Israel which includes attacks on nuclear facilities in the Islamic Republic of Iran.

  • Statement by the Federal Chancellor Federal Chancellor Merz on the Israeli attacks on facilities in Iran Germany - Federal Government 13 Jun 2025 -- Following Israel's attacks on Iranian facilities, Chancellor Merz has reaffirmed Israel's right to defend its existence and the safety of its citizens. At the same time, he called on both sides to refrain from steps that could lead to further escalation and destabilise the entire region.
  • Spanish Government condemns military escalation in the Middle East after Israel's attacks against Iran Spain MFA 13 Jun 2025
  • Statement of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs - Iran 13/06/2025 Algeria Ministry of Foreign Affairs 13 Jun 2025
  • Chinese FM spokesperson responds to whether China supports Iran blocking the Strait of Hormuz Global Times 13 Jun 2025 -- In response to a media inquiry which said Iran has repeatedly threatened to block the Strait of Hormuz if it comes under further attack, which now seems likely after Israel's strike and whether China supports Iran taking such action as a retaliatory measure, Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Lin Jian on Friday said that he would not comment on hypothetical questions. The renewed escalation of tensions in the region is not in the interest of any party.
  • China is highly concerned Israel's attacks on Iran; deeply worried about potential consequence: FM spokesperson Global Times 13 Jun 2025 -- In response to a media inquiry regarding Israel's launching attacks on multiple targets inside Iran early this morning, Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Lin Jian said on Friday that Lin Jian responded that China is highly concerned about Israel's attacks on Iran and deeply worried about the potential serious consequences of these actions.
  • Kuwait condemns Israeli invasion of Iran; Tehran vows decisive response IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- The Kuwaiti foreign minister vehemently condemns the Israeli regime invasion of Iran, calling it a "blatant invasion of Iranian sovereignty, international law, and United Nations Charter."
  • World reacts to Israeli attacks on Iran IRNA 13 Jun 2025 -- After the Israeli regime's attack on Iran, different countries, organizations, and some officials from around the world have reacted to this aggressive act.
  • OIC Secretary-General Receives Call from Iran's Foreign Minister Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) 13 Jun 2025
  • India urges Iran, Israel to avoid escalation People's Daily 13 Jun 2025 -- The Indian government on Friday expressed deep concern over the recent developments between Iran and Israel and called for restraint from both sides.
  • HRH the Crown Prince, French President Discuss Regional Developments SPA 13 Jun 2025 -- His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, held a phone call with President Donald J. Trump of the United States of America, during which they discussed developments in the region, including the Israeli military operations against Iran
  • Foreign Minister, Qatari Counterpart Discuss Israeli Attack on Iran SPA 13 Jun 2025 -- Minister of Foreign Affairs Prince Faisal bin Farhan bin Abdullah today received a phone call from Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs of Qatar Sheikh Mohammed bin Abdulrahman bin Jassim Al Thani
  • Foreign Minister Holds Phone Call with Egypt's Foreign Minister SPA 13 Jun 2025 -- Minister of Foreign Affairs Prince Faisal bin Farhan bin Abdullah held a phone call with Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Arab Republic of Egypt Dr. Badr Abdelatty
  • Foreign Minister Holds Phone Call with Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister of Jordan SPA 13 Jun 2025 -- Minister of Foreign Affairs Prince Faisal bin Farhan bin Abdullah held a phone call with Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs and Expatriates of the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan Dr. Ayman Safadi
  • Foreign Minister Holds Phone Call with Iranian Foreign Minister SPA 13 Jun 2025 -- Minister of Foreign Affairs Prince Faisal bin Farhan bin Abdullah held a phone call with Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Islamic Republic of Iran Abbas Araghchi
  • Saudi Arabia Strongly Condemns the Blatant Israeli Aggressions Against Iran SPA 13 Jun 2025 -- The Kingdom of Saudi Arabia expresses its strong condemnation and denunciation of the blatant Israeli aggressions against the brotherly Islamic Republic of Iran, which undermine its sovereignty and security and constitute a clear violation of international laws and norms
  • Putin Holds Phone Calls With Iran's President, Israel's Prime Minister - Kremlin Sputnik 13 Jun 2025 -- Here are the key statements from the Kremlin following the talks, which followed Israel's unprecedented overnight surprise attack on Iran.
  • Russia Concerned, Condemns Sharp Escalation of Tension Between Israel, Iran - Kremlin Sputnik 13 Jun 2025 -- Russia is concerned about and condemns the sharp escalation of tensions between Israel and Iran, Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov told reporters.
  • Israeli 'barbaric' aggression against Iran draws global condemnation Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Top officials and governments around the world have condemned the Israeli aggression targeting Iran's military commanders, nuclear scientists and civilians early Friday.
  • Israel's Strikes On Iran Test Putin's Position As Potential Mideast Broker RFE/RL 13 Jun 2025 -- Israel's strikes against Iran's nuclear complex and military leadership have sent shock waves around the globe, raising fears of escalation and a wider war in the region. But the shock-and-awe campaign also reverberated in Moscow, where Russian President Vladimir Putin has positioned himself as a powerful interlocutor with Tehran.
  • Telephone conversations with President of Iran Masoud Pezeshkian and Prime Minister of Israel Benjamin Netanyahu President of Russia 13 Jun 2025 -- In light of the dangerous escalation resulting from Israel's act of force against Iran, Vladimir Putin had telephone conversations with President of Iran Masoud Pezeshkian and Prime Minister of Israel Benjamin Netanyahu.
  • Foreign Ministry statement in connection with Israel's strikes on Iran Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 13 Jun 2025
  • Putin: Israeli aggressions considered blatant violation of international law Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- In a phone call with President Masoud Pezeshkian, Russian President Vladimir Putin has condemned the Israeli regime's illegal attacks against Iran.
  • Statement by the Chancellor Federal Chancellor Friedrich Merz on the Israeli attacks on facilities in Iran Germany - Federal Government 13 Jun 2025
  • Situation surrounding Israel's attack against Iran (Statement by Foreign Minister IWAYA Takeshi) Ministry of Foregn Affairs of Japan 13 Jun 2025
  • OIC General Secretariat Strongly Condemns Flagrant Israeli Aggression against Islamic Republic of Iran Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) 13 Jun 2025
  • Pakistan Strongly Condemns Unjustified and Illegitimate Aggression by Israel Against the Islamic Republic of Iran Pakistan Ministry of Foreign Affairs 13 Jun 2025 -- Pakistan strongly condemns unjustified and illegitimate aggression by Israel against the Islamic Republic of Iran. The Israeli military strikes violate the sovereignty and territorial integrity of the Islamic Republic of Iran and clearly contravene the UN Charter and fundamental principles of international law. Iran has the right to self-defence under Article 51 of the UN Charter.
  • PH urges Israel, Iran to 'deescalate, follow path of peace' Philippine News Agency 13 Jun 2025 -- The Philippine government, through the Department of Foreign Affairs (DFA), expressed "grave concern" over heightened tensions in the Middle East following Israel's unprecedented direct attack on Iran.
  • UK, France, Germany urge Israel to refrain from escalation Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Britain, France and Germany have called on Israel to refrain from further escalation following the regime's attacks on residential areas and nuclear sites in some Iranian cities, including the capital Tehran.
  • Ayatollah Sistani strongly condemns Israel's 'criminal act' against Iran Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- Iraq's prominent Shia cleric, Grand Ayatollah Ali al-Sistani, has strongly condemned Israel's "criminal act" against Iran that killed civilians, scientists and military commanders.
  • Zionist aggression against Iran marks dangerous escalation: Hamas Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- The Palestinian resistance movement Hamas has condemned in the strongest terms the large-scale aggression by the Israeli regime against Iran.
  • Hezbollah: Iran to emerge stronger from US-backed Israeli attacks; Washington, Tel Aviv will reap defeat Press TV 13 Jun 2025 -- The secretary-general of Lebanon's Hezbollah resistance movement has asserted that Iran would "emerge stronger" following a string of "US-backed Israeli assassinations" of its senior military commanders and nuclear scientists.
  • Joint statement by the Prime Minister and the President of the Republic on Israel's attacks on Iran Republic of Slovenia 13 Jun 2025
  • No: 121, 13 June 2025, Regarding Israel's Attack on Iran Republic of Turkey Ministry of Foreign Affairs 13 Jun 2025
  • The UK urges all parties to show restraint and reduce tensions: UK statement at the UN Security Council UK FCDO 13 Jun 2025 -- Statement by Ambassador Barbara Woodward, UK Permanent Representative to the UN, at the emergency UN Security Council meeting on Iran.
  • PM call with President Trump of the United States: 13 June 2025 Gov.UK 13 Jun 2025
  • PM call with President Macron of France and Chancellor Merz of Germany: 13 June 2025 Gov.UK 13 Jun 2025
  • PM call with Prime Minister Netanyahu of Israel: 13 June 2025 Gov.UK 13 Jun 2025
  • Statement of the MFA of Ukraine on the aggravation of the security situation in the Middle East Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine 13 Jun 2025
  • Announcement by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Cyprus regarding the activation of the Special National Plan ESTIA Republic of Cyprus 13 Jun 2025 -- In light of the escalating developments in the region, and following the activation of the Special National Plan ESTIA, the Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Cyprus, Dr Constantinos Kombos, convened today Friday, 13 June 2025, the Ministerial Crisis Management Team, comprising the Minister of Foreign Affairs, the Minister of Defence, the Minister of Interior and the Minister of Justice and Public Order.

    • Other Conflicts

  • Today's top news: Occupied Palestinian Territory, Chad UNOCHA 13 Jun 2025

  • Security Council Press Statement on Sudan UN Security Council 12 Jun 2025

  • South Sudan's peace deal at risk of collapse without stronger regional action, warns UN Commission OHCHR 13 Jun 2025 -- The UN Commission on Human Rights in South Sudan has sounded the alarm that the 2018 Revitalized (Peace) Agreement is at serious risk of collapse and called for urgent, coordinated regional intervention to salvage the faltering peace process.
  • Revision of the Implementation Plan for the International Peace Cooperation Assignments in South Sudan Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan 13 Jun 2025 -- At cabinet meeting on June 13, 2025, the Government of Japan decided to revise the Implementation Plan for the International Peace Cooperation Assignments in South Sudan to extend its period, in light of the significance of continuing contribution toward the international peace and security.

  • Rwandan Immigrant Arrested for Concealing Role as Perpetrator of Genocide After Fraudulently Entering the United States US Dept. of Justice 13 Jun 2025 -- A federal grand jury in Ohio has returned a three-count indictment unsealed today charging Rwandan national Vincent Nzigiyimfura, also known as Vincent Mfura, 65, of Dayton, Ohio with lying on his U.S. immigration and naturalization applications. Specifically, the indictment alleges that he concealed his role as a perpetrator of the genocide in Rwanda in 1994, among other misrepresentations.

  • DR Congo crisis: Aid teams appeal for support to help displaced communities left with nothing UN News 13 Jun 2025 -- As diplomatic efforts continue to end fighting in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), the UN development agency (UNDP) issued an appeal on Friday on behalf of people uprooted by the violence to help them rebuild their lives and livelihoods.

  • Haiti: UN Human Rights Chief alarmed by widening violence as gangs expand reach OHCHR 13 Jun 2025 -- UN Human Rights Chief Volker Türk said today that the human rights crisis in Haiti has plummeted to a new low, with gangs extending their reach beyond Port-au-Prince and into the central regions of the country, carrying out killings, rapes and kidnappings. A record 1.3 million people are now displaced by violence.

  • Cambodia cuts internet from Thailand as tensions grow after border clash Radio Free Asia 13 Jun 2025 -- Tensions between Cambodia and Thailand escalated Friday on the eve of talks on a border dispute as Cambodia cut internet services, stopped airing Thai movies and cancelled boxing bouts involving Thai fighters.

News Reports

  • Afghan National Pleads Guilty to Plotting Election Day Terror Attack in the United States US Dept. of Justice 13 Jun 2025 -- Nasir Ahmad Tawhedi, 27, a native and citizen of Afghanistan, pleaded guilty today in federal court in Oklahoma City to two terrorism-related offenses: conspiring and attempting to provide material support and resources to the Islamic State of Iraq and al-Sham (ISIS), a designated foreign terrorist organization, and receiving, attempting to receive, and conspiring to receive firearms and ammunition in furtherance of a federal crime of terrorism.

  • Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Lin Jian's Regular Press Conference on June 13, 2025 PRC MofA 13 Jun 2025
  • China labor rights group shuts down in latest setback for civil society in Hong Kong Radio Free Asia 13 Jun 2025 -- A Hong Kong-based labor rights group founded by prominent Chinese labor activist Han Dongfang has announced it is shutting down after three decades of tracking workers' protests in China, citing financial difficulties and debt woes.

  • Whoever emboldens "Taiwan Independence" separatist forces to seek secession will get burnt for playing with fire: Defense Spokesperson PRC MND 13 Jun 2025 -- "Any act that emboldens the 'Taiwan independence' separatist forces to seek secession will undermine cross-Strait peace and stability, and lead to bitter results or self-inflicted wounds," said Senior Colonel Jiang Bin, spokesperson for China's Ministry of National Defense, at a press briefing on Friday.
  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 13 Jun 2025

  • The Foreign Secretary's Mansion House Speech 2025 UK FCDO 13 Jun 2025 -- The Foreign Secretary delivers his 2025 Mansion House Speech.

  • Meeting of Foreign Secretary with Vice Minister of Foreign Affairs of the People's Republic of China India MEA 13 Jun 2025 -- On 12 June 2025, Foreign Secretary Shri Vikram Misri met the Vice Foreign Minister of the People's Republic of China H.E. Mr. Sun Weidong, who is on a two-day visit to India on 12-13 June 2025.

  • Press Conference by Foreign Minister IWAYA Takeshi Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan 13 Jun 2025
  • Japan-U.S. Summit Telephone Talk Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan 13 Jun 2025

  • FATF and MONEYVAL adopt report on Latvia: first worldwide evaluation under new evaluation round Council of Europe 13 Jun 2025 -- A joint FATF-MONEYVAL plenary meeting, hosted by the Council of Europe, brought together in Strasbourg on 12 and 13 June representatives of the Global Network of over 200 jurisdictions and observers aiming to strengthen global efforts to disrupt criminal activity.

  • Secretary General Alain Berset voices strong support for reform and peace at conclusion of first visit to Armenia Council of Europe 13 Jun 2025 -- On his first visit to Armenia as Secretary General of the Council of Europe, Alain Berset reaffirmed the Organisation's unwavering support for the country's democratic development and called for the swift signature of a peace agreement between Armenia and Azerbaijan.

  • New Humanitarian Aid Strategy Government Offices of Sweden 13 Jun 2025 -- The Swedish Government has decided to adopt a new strategy for humanitarian aid for 2025—2029. Sida is tasked with its implementation.

  • Indonesia Press Remarks - Remarks to media alongside Indonesian Foreign Minister Sugiono New Zealand Government 13 Jun 2025
  • Joint Statement: By the Foreign Ministers of the Republic of Indonesia and New Zealand at the 12th Joint Ministerial Commission New Zealand Government 13 Jun 2025 -- His Excellency Sugiono, Minister for Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Indonesia, and Rt Hon Winston Peters, Minister of Foreign Affairs of New Zealand, convened the 12th meeting of the Joint Ministerial Commission (JMC) on 13th June 2025 in Jakarta, Indonesia.
  • Foreign Minister visit strengthens ties with Indonesia New Zealand Government 13 Jun 2025 -- Foreign Minister Winston Peters' visit to Indonesia today has secured tangible progress in New Zealand's relationship with Southeast Asia's most populous nation.

  • Weimar+: press remarks by High Representative/Vice-President Kaja Kallas upon arrival European External Action Service (EEAS) 12 Jun 2025

  • World News in Brief: Rights abuses in Haiti, Sudan war sees exodus to Chad, food trade optimism UN News 13 Jun 2025 -- Escalating gang violence in Haiti has displaced a record 1.3 million people, UN human rights chief Volker Türk said on Friday.
